artifacts.summary: Import conflict root cause analysis and solution recommendations. The elaboration-order sensitivity bug is fixable by hardening proofs with explicit type annotations. Recommended Solution 1: add 'generalizing M2' and explicit arguments to induction hypothesis applications.

partial_progress.details: Research complete: identified root cause (diamond dependency causing elaboration order sensitivity), recommended Solution 1 (harden proofs), provided implementation plan

key_findings.root_cause: Diamond import dependency between CanonicalFMCS and CanonicalIrreflexivity chains causes elaboration order sensitivity in induction hypothesis type inference
key_findings.why_discretetimeline_works: Imports CanonicalIrreflexivityAxiom directly without CanonicalFMCS chain, avoiding the diamond
key_findings.solution: Add 'generalizing M2' clause to induction and explicit type annotations to ih applications
key_findings.effort_estimate: 2.5-3 hours to unblock and complete both proofs

cross_task_impact.task_974: Unrelated - its sorries are about DF discreteness property, not imports
cross_task_impact.task_977: Phase 4 depends on 973; will be unblocked once 973 completes
cross_task_impact.task_978: Typeclass architecture could eventually eliminate this class of issues
